description: Results page improvements: Fix video solution player, show all question answer options open by default in analysis, show written solution only after clicking button. Rating page: fetch and display real user ratings. Pricing page: direct to Telegram bot with specific plan info.
steps: 1. Update src/app/[locale]/(main)/results/[id]/page.tsx - Question analysis: Remove the expandedQuestion toggle behavior. Instead show all questions with their options always visible (expanded by default). Keep the question header styling (correct/incorrect/skipped) but remove the click-to-expand. Options should always be shown.
2. Update results page: Keep 'Yozma yechim' button behavior - explanation should only show after clicking the button (this already works correctly, just confirm).

3. Fix 'Umumiy videoyechim' - the SecureYouTubePlayer component. Check if the issue is that the YouTube IFrame API doesn't load properly. The fix: ensure the iframe src has enablejsapi=1 and the player initialization waits for both the API to load and the iframe to render. Add a fallback: if API doesn't load in 3 seconds, show the iframe with native controls.

4. Create API route /api/rating/route.ts: GET returns top users ranked by total score across all tests. Include: user name, total tests taken, average percentage, total score. Support query param ?limit=50.

5. Update src/app/[locale]/(main)/rating/page.tsx: Replace empty state with real rating data from /api/rating. Show top users in a leaderboard table with rank, avatar, name, tests count, average score, total points. Highlight current user's position.

6. Update src/app/[locale]/(main)/pricing/page.tsx: Change handleBuy function to deep-link to Telegram bot with specific plan info. Use URL format: https://t.me/EduPrimeuzbot?start=buy_premium_1month (or buy_teacher_1month etc). Each plan button should link to specific duration.

7. Update src/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts: Handle /start with buy_premium_1month, buy_premium_6months, buy_premium_1year, buy_teacher_1month, buy_teacher_6months, buy_teacher_1year parameters. If user hasn't started bot before, show welcome first then payment info. If already known, directly show payment details for that plan.
8. Add duration selector to pricing page: for premium and ustoz plans, show 1 month / 6 months / 1 year options with prices, then the 'Sotib olish' button uses the selected duration in the bot link.
acceptance_criteria: Results page shows all questions with options expanded by default
Written solution only shows after clicking 'Yozma yechim' button
Video solution player works (YouTube iframe loads and plays)
Rating page shows real user leaderboard from database
Pricing 'Sotib olish' button links to bot with specific plan param
Bot handles plan-specific start commands and shows payment info
findings: All changes build successfully. Results page no longer uses expandedQuestion state - questions show options always. SecureYouTubePlayer adds 3s timeout fallback with native controls. Rating API uses Prisma groupBy on TestResult. Pricing uses duration selector state and constructs deep links like buy_premium_1month. Telegram webhook handles plan-specific start params by checking/creating user in DB then showing payment info.
